_meta.description: Single source of truth for UI structure. Documents current layout, target structure during refactors, and history. Agents MUST read this before any structural changes.

current_structure.description: Phase 2 complete + nav/route cleanup done (commit 8e536fc). Single canonical route tree under app/(platform)/service/. All legacy parallel routes deleted and replaced with permanent redirects in next.config.mjs. Single navigation model (lifecycle nav only). 5 deprecated components deleted. ~68 duplicate page files removed (~30K lines). Flat lib/*.ts mock-data files still exist — NOT yet deleted (see pending_work).
current_structure.app_structure: ROUTE GROUPS — app/(public)/, app/(platform)/, app/(ops)/. ALL platform content is canonical at app/(platform)/service/. Legacy flat routes are redirects only.
current_structure.canonical_content_tree: app/(platform)/service/ — contains all real page.tsx files for data, trading, execution, reports, research (strategy + ml + execution)
current_structure.navigation_model: SINGLE MODEL — lifecycle nav only (shell/lifecycle-nav.tsx). Legacy GlobalNavBar, AppShell, RoleLayout, LifecycleRail, UnifiedBatchShell all deleted.
current_structure.mock_data: MSW — lib/mocks/handlers/ (15 domain handlers + index.ts) with persona-scoped fixtures in lib/mocks/fixtures/personas.ts
current_structure.state_management: 4 Zustand stores in lib/stores/ + React Query in hooks/api/ (14 hooks)
current_structure.api_layer: React Query hooks in hooks/api/ (14 hooks). MSW serves data when NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK_API=true
current_structure.auth: 5 demo personas in lib/mocks/fixtures/personas.ts: admin, internal-trader, client-full, client-data-only, client-premium (Vertex). Role/org/entitlements in auth-store.
current_structure.shells: WIRED — app/(public)/layout.tsx (SiteHeader + footer), app/(platform)/layout.tsx (RequireAuth + UnifiedShell + lifecycle nav), app/(ops)/layout.tsx (RequireAuth + role gate)
current_structure.components: 57 UI primitives in components/ui/, 30 trading components in components/trading/, 10 platform components in components/platform/, 19 deployment components in components/ops/deployment/, 6 role dashboards in components/dashboards/
current_structure.design_system: globals.css with semantic tokens, IBM Plex Sans + JetBrains Mono, dark institutional theme
current_structure.registry_data: lib/registry/ — openapi.json (298 endpoints), openapi.yaml, config-registry.json (46 service configs), sharding_config.yaml, system-topology.json, runtime-topology.yaml, ui-reference-data.json
current_structure.structure_docs: CODEBASE_STRUCTURE.md (root-level agent index), docs/STRUCTURE_APP.md, docs/STRUCTURE_COMPONENTS.md, docs/STRUCTURE_LIB.md, docs/STRUCTURE_HOOKS.md, docs/STRUCTURE_CONTEXT.md, docs/STRUCTURE_REFERENCE.md
current_structure.tests: MINIMAL — 4 unit tests, 2 E2E specs, coverage threshold set to 50% (target: 70%)

routes._note: Only real page.tsx files listed. All legacy flat routes (/trading/*, /execution/*, /ml/*, /research/*, /strategy-platform/*, etc.) are permanent redirects in next.config.mjs — no page files exist at those paths.

redirects_only._note: These URLs work but have NO page.tsx. They resolve via next.config.mjs permanent redirects. Do NOT create page files at these paths.

pending_work.description: Work that was planned in Phase 2 target_structure but not yet completed.

items.description: 8 flat lib/*.ts mock-data files still exist and pages still import from them directly. Must be deleted after all pages are wired to React Query hooks consuming MSW handlers.
files_to_delete: lib/taxonomy.ts (810 lines → handlers/data.ts or keep as lib/config/taxonomy.ts)
items.blocker: All page components must switch to React Query hooks before flat files can be removed

items.description: 14 React Query hooks exist in hooks/api/ but most page components still import mock data directly from flat lib/*.ts files. Each page component needs to be updated to use the hook instead.
items.notes: use-instruments.ts was the Phase 2 proof-of-concept. Remaining 13 hooks need page-level wiring.

items.description: Coverage at ~minimal (4 unit tests, 2 E2E). Target 70% per quality gates.

target_structure.status: Phase 3 — React Query Full Wiring + Flat File Cleanup
target_structure.description: Wire all page components to React Query hooks (consuming MSW handlers). Delete the 8 flat lib/*.ts mock-data files once all pages are migrated. Increase test coverage to 70%.
key_changes: Update all page components to import data from hooks/api/ instead of lib/*.ts
Delete the 8 flat mock-data files listed in pending_work.delete-flat-mock-files
Add React Query invalidation and optimistic updates to mutation hooks
Add error boundaries around data-dependent page sections
Increase test coverage to 70% (add unit tests for hooks and stores)
Add Playwright E2E tests for the 5 persona login flows

list.description: Full system admin. Sees everything: platform, ops, deployments, user management.
Internal trading desk. All platform features, no ops/admin pages.
External client with full subscription. Sees own org data only.
External client with basic data tier. 180 instruments, CEFI only.
Premium execution client. Data + strategy + Smart Alpha execution, no ML.

deleted_in_cleanup.reason: Zero consumers after navigation model consolidated to lifecycle nav only

files: alerts.ts — alert CRUD, severity filtering, acknowledge/resolve (client-scoped)
audit.ts — compliance checks, event history, data health (internal-only)
deployment.ts — services, deployments, cloud builds, shards (internal-only)
execution.ts — orders, fills, execution results, backtest grids (client-scoped)
market-data.ts — OHLCV candles, book snapshots, trades (shared, REST only)
positions.ts — positions, risk groups, margin, historical (client-scoped)
risk.ts — limits, exposure, VaR, Greeks, stress scenarios (client-scoped)
service-status.ts — service health, feature freshness, system overview (internal-only for full view)
user-management.ts — orgs, users, roles, subscriptions (internal sees all; client sees own org)

lib_registry.description: Generated reference files. Do not edit manually — regenerate from source.

files.openapi.json: 298 API endpoints across all backend services
files.openapi.yaml: Same as openapi.json in YAML format
files.config-registry.json: 46 service configuration classes with all fields, types, and defaults
files.sharding_config.yaml: Shard definitions (CEFI, DeFi, Sports, TradFi) with venue mappings
files.runtime-topology.yaml: Runtime mode configuration (live vs batch per service)
files.ui-reference-data.json: Static reference data: venues, asset classes, currencies

lib_registry.regenerate: Run generator scripts in unified-trading-pm to refresh these files

structure_documentation.description: Documentation files for agent navigation. Created 2026-03-21.
structure_documentation.root_index: CODEBASE_STRUCTURE.md — one-page agent index, read this first

deep_docs.docs/STRUCTURE_APP.md: Full route tree, three parallel domain trees, dynamic routes, layout hierarchy
deep_docs.docs/STRUCTURE_COMPONENTS.md: All component domains with file-level detail, naming rules, collision warnings
deep_docs.docs/STRUCTURE_LIB.md: lib/ layout — stores, mocks, config, types, pending flat file cleanup
deep_docs.docs/STRUCTURE_HOOKS.md: hooks/api/ domain map, React Query patterns, MSW wiring
deep_docs.docs/STRUCTURE_CONTEXT.md: context/ reference folder — what each subfolder provides and when to use it
deep_docs.docs/STRUCTURE_REFERENCE.md: _reference/ Python services — what they contain, how to read them

refactor_history.title: Initial Architecture & Rules Setup
refactor_history.description: V0 generated prototype with marketing pages, trading components, inline mock data. Architecture docs and coding rules established.

refactor_history.title: Rules Alignment for Next.js App Router + Dimensional Scoping
refactor_history.description: Rewrote .cursorrules, V0_SYSTEM_PROMPT.txt, REFACTORING_PLAN for Next.js App Router. Added dimensional mocking (same endpoint, different data per persona), demo personas with entitlements, Zustand+React Query rules, cache reset protocol, MSW migration manifest. Refreshed lib/registry/ with latest generated files.
changes: .cursorrules rewritten for Next.js App Router + (public)/(platform)/(ops) route groups
V0_SYSTEM_PROMPT.txt rewritten with one-platform model + 3 USPs + dimensional scoping
REFACTORING_PLAN Phase 2 expanded: shells in-repo, MSW migration manifest, type-gen, auth personas, state mgmt
SHARDING_DIMENSIONS.md rewritten as 3-layer model
lib/registry/ refreshed with latest generated files (openapi.json, config-registry.json, etc.)
Updated PM cursor-rules and codex docs

refactor_history.title: Phase 2 Structural Refactor — Shell Infrastructure + MSW Migration
refactor_history.description: Created route groups (public)/(platform)/(ops) with shell layouts. Moved all 32 page directories. Created lib/config/. Set up MSW with 15 handlers. Created 5 personas with entitlement-based scoping. Added 4 Zustand stores + React Query client + reset-demo. Generated types from openapi.json. Created 14 React Query hooks.
changes: app/(public)/layout.tsx — PublicShell: SiteHeader + footer, no auth
app/(platform)/layout.tsx — PlatformShell: RequireAuth + UnifiedShell
app/(ops)/layout.tsx — OpsShell: RequireAuth + role=internal/admin gate
32 page directories moved into route groups (URLs unchanged)
lib/config/ — api.ts, branding.ts, auth.ts, services.ts, index.ts
lib/mocks/ — browser.ts, server.ts, utils.ts
lib/mocks/handlers/ — 15 domain handlers + index.ts
lib/mocks/fixtures/personas.ts — 5 demo personas
lib/stores/ — filter-store.ts, auth-store.ts, ui-prefs-store.ts, global-scope-store.ts
lib/query-client.ts, lib/reset-demo.ts, lib/providers.tsx
hooks/use-auth.ts upgraded — role/org/entitlements, persona login/switch
hooks/api/ — 14 React Query hooks (use-instruments proof-of-concept + 13 domain hooks)
lib/types/api-generated.ts — generated from openapi.json
Dependencies: msw, zustand, @tanstack/react-query, openapi-typescript

refactor_history.title: Fix 404s, Remove Legacy Nav Model, Consolidate to Single Canonical Route Tree
refactor_history.description: ~68 duplicate page files (~30K lines) deleted. All legacy flat routes now permanent redirects to /service/*. 5 deprecated components deleted. 3 pages with unique content copied to canonical /service/* locations before deletion. 3 placeholder pages added to fix 404 broken links. All pages migrated off legacy GlobalNavBar/AppShell/RoleLayout wrappers.

DELETED: app/(platform)/ml/* (all 11 pages) → permanent redirects to /service/research/ml/*
DELETED: app/(platform)/research/ml/* (all 11 pages) → same canonical location
DELETED: app/(platform)/research/strategy/* (all 7 pages) → /service/research/strategy/*
DELETED: app/(platform)/strategy-platform/* (all 8 pages) → /service/research/strategy/*

COPIED before deletion: /service/data/markets/pnl (335 lines), /service/research/strategy/overview (611 lines), /service/research/quant
ADDED placeholder pages: /portal/execution, /portal/whitelabel, /settings
DELETED components (5): trading/global-nav-bar.tsx, trading/app-shell.tsx, trading/lifecycle-rail.tsx, shell/role-layout.tsx, platform/unified-batch-shell.tsx
UPDATED unified-shell.tsx: removed useLegacyNav prop and conditional rendering
FIXED role-selection.tsx: stale UserRole type import
ADDED 30+ permanent redirects to next.config.mjs
MIGRATED 25+ pages off legacy nav wrappers (GlobalNavBar, AppShell, RoleLayout)
Result: 1 nav model, 0 broken links, 0 double-redirect chains, 0 deprecated component references, build passing

for_agents: READ FIRST: CODEBASE_STRUCTURE.md at repo root — one page, folder map + decision guide.
DEEP DOCS: docs/STRUCTURE_*.md — one file per major folder (app, components, lib, hooks, context, _reference).

CANONICAL ROUTE TREE: All platform content lives under app/(platform)/service/. Legacy paths (/trading/*, /execution/*, /ml/*, /research/*, /strategy-platform/*, etc.) are permanent redirects in next.config.mjs — NO page.tsx files exist there. See routes.redirects_only.
ADDING NEW PAGES: Always create under app/(platform)/service/<domain>/. Never at old flat paths.
SINGLE NAV MODEL: lifecycle nav only (shell/lifecycle-nav.tsx). GlobalNavBar, AppShell, RoleLayout, LifecycleRail, UnifiedBatchShell are DELETED — do not recreate them.
PERSONAS: 5 demo personas (admin, internal-trader, client-full, client-data-only, client-premium). See personas section.
PENDING: 8 flat lib/*.ts mock-data files still exist and pages import from them directly. Do NOT delete until the page is migrated to React Query hook. See pending_work section.
CONTEXT FOLDER: context/ is NOT React context files. It is read-only backend reference material (API specs, schemas, topology). See docs/STRUCTURE_CONTEXT.md.
REFERENCE FOLDER: _reference/ is Python FastAPI backend code — READ ONLY, do not modify, do not import.
STAGING AUTH: NEXT_PUBLIC_STAGING_AUTH=true enables password protection (Cloud Run only).
MOCK MODE: NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK_API=true — MSW intercepts all fetch calls, no real backend needed.
rules: Any structural change (new folder, route group change, new store) MUST be documented here FIRST
Before making breaking changes, agent MUST ask user: 'I plan to [change]. Approve?'
If refactor spans multiple sessions, agent updates 'current_structure' to match actual state before resuming
Do not delete flat lib/*.ts mock-data files until the consuming pages are fully wired to React Query hooks
